use_cases: Freelancer or developer landing pages inviting potential clients to collaborate
Portfolio or personal website sections for booking discovery calls
Creative agency hero sections prompting next steps with clients
ai_summary: A minimalist 'Let's Work Together' CTA section with hover animations and a success state reveal after clicking. Features a call-to-action button that links to a booking calendar (Cal.com) and includes elegant text transitions. Designed for freelancer and developer portfolios to invite collaboration and work inquiries with smooth cubic-bezier easing.
